feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Concur
feed.subtitle: SAP Concur Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How is data used
entry.content: Will client data be copied and used for any purpose by SAP Concur other than providing a service to said client? Thanks

entry.title: SAP Concur User API not working
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I'm trying to fetch users using this 2 APIs:

1. https://<tenant-name>/api/v3.0/common/users

2. https://<tenant-name>/api/user/v1.0/user

After hitting the above url, I'm getting this Error:

{ "Error": { "Message": "Forbidden Request", "Server-Time": "2023-10-27T05:25:56", "Id": "A33333E7-***********************" }}Can anyone tell me whether this APIs are still supported in SAP Concur or this are deprecated API's?Regards'Dabblu

entry.title: User is not authorized to access this resource. Please assign applicable scopes to this user
entry.content:
Hi, when trying to hit the API from postman getting below error. Everything looks good in headers and authorization part, what could have gone wrong with API?

API Reference- https://www.concursolutions.com/api/user/v1.0

Postman Body-

{

"Error": { "Message": "Forbidden Request", "Server-Time": "2023-10-30T21:49:24", "Id": "018883A0-68AC-4BCA-9AA7-4A075FF8E2C1" }}

entry.title: Add entries into CTE_D_ACC_ATTR table
entry.content:
Hello There,

I got a requirement to SPLIT the expenses into SAP ECC.
The field that comes with the Tax Id vendor is MerchantTaxID, whoever, this field does not exist into the table CTE_D_ACC_ATTR.

Are there any way to insert an additional line into this master data table?

In addition, are there any code examples for the SPLIT badi?

Thanks, and best regards,

Oscar

entry.title: Debug Concur BADI
entry.content:
I want to debug Concur BADI for expense Report. I have JSON file in SAP.

Please help

Regards

entry.title: SAP Concur - My expense reports and history is deleted from my account. Any idea why?
entry.content:
Not sure what's going on with my account, but I had spent a while putting together a bunch of mobile phone reports together from the past 2 years (which probably needs to be approved by finance).

In any case, I had done reports for this current year and it got auto approved.

The weird part is that neither of these reports are located or mentioned inside of my concur account, and I had no email to confirm that my last expense report went through either.

Any idea whats happening?

entry.title: Ryanair Travel Agreement with SAP Concur
entry.content:
Fasten your seatbelts for a juicy one! I saw today that Ryanair is partnering with SAP Concur to offer affordable corporate travel: Ryanair Signs 'Groundbreaking' Corporate Travel Agreement.

So Ryanair, the budget airline we all love (or love to hate) just hooked up with SAP Concur...what does this mean for the future of business travel?

entry.title: Different values for same field in SE16 and SE16N
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a issue where I am getting different values for same table data.

I am displaying data in BSEG table.

for field WBS-Element (PROJK), it is displaying converted value for that WBS element in SE16, but in SE16N for the Document Number is is displaying another data which is unconverted. Now, I want same data in both of these tcodes (either converted or unconverted).

How can I solve this ? Help appreciated !

entry.title: Integration of SAP Community and SAP Concur Community
entry.content:
Hi,

As part of Migrating all the SAP Concur Sites under SAP tree. Is their any plan to move the SAP Concur Community site as well under SAP Community?

Regards

Jyotesh

entry.title: Need help integrating test systems i.e. SAP Concur to SuccessFactors.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Need help integrating test systems i.e. SAP Concur to SuccessFactors. Both are Test clients and we want to integrate via API / middleware, as SFTP is not available for test systems. 

Pls guide.

Br,

Kumar Dave

 API Management, API

entry.title: how to download files from URL to a folder using SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Everyone.

I have a requirement to retrieve the images from Concur. When I make the API call, it returns the URL of the pdf image which is valid for 15 mins. I need to store this to a folder for further processing.

As a POC, When I call this URL using request reply and send it to a mail, I am receiving white blank pdf attachments.Can you please advise ?

An update: When I get response after calling the URL, I have applied MIME Multipart encoder and If I take that base64 string and use online tool(https://base64.guru/converter/decode/pdf)  to decode it to PDF, it looks good.

How do I extract the base64 string and decode it to PDF in CPI ?

 

Thanks,
Varun

entry.title: Concur (other data field) > S/4Hana FI Posting
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In Concur Financial Integration Posting to S/4Hana, the first table that is being updated is the BPKF-BSEG table with the aid of a BADI.  Can this be extended to the universal journal (ACDOCA) too? Using BADI alone can perform the update?

Thanks in advance!

SAP ERP integration with SAP Concur solutions SAP Concur

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere connection to SAP ARIBA (SAP RISE Subs...
entry.content:
Precog is an approved and widely used data integration solution that makes it easy to get data from Ariba, SuccessFactors, Concur, Fieldglass, CX, S/4 HANA, Business One, Marketing Cloud, and more (2000+ SaaS APIs) into Datasphpere (and other data warehouses/databases): ELT for Datasphere.

Here's a good overview (video) of the AI-driven, no-code data integration (ELT) solution: Precog An SAP BTP Story

entry.title: Posting failed 243(F5) : Account type D is not defined for document type ER.
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a posting failure in SAP ICS system. An expense which needs to be paid with vendor account type - K with document type ER.  This is the only expense report failed in posting with reason as (customer) account type D. All other users and the same user previous reports were paid in vendor account itself.

I could see account type k is selected in transaction OBA7. We are not sure, why it asking us to define account type D for posting instead of account type K.

Need help in fixing it to make the payment in Vendor account. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Urgent: Getting 403: forbidden error on performing "check connection" in ICS
entry.content:
Hi,
I am new to ICS setup and getting 403: forbidden error on performing "check connection" in ICS. How do I fix this issue?
TIA

entry.title: Insufficient permissions to access the requested data
entry.content:
While hitting "profile/identity/v4.1/Users/.search" API in Postman getting below error:

{
    "status": 401,
    "schemas": [
        "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:Error",
        "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:concur:2.0:Error"
    ],
    "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:concur:2.0:Error": {
        "messages": [
            {
                "code": "UNAUTHORIZED"
            }
        ]
    },
    "detail": "Insufficient permissions to access the requested data"
}
Need help to resolve this issue, thanks

entry.title: Facing issue while increasing budget in ICS
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have received an error regarding insufficient funds during "Financial posting" (screenshot). To remedy the same I am trying to increase the budget, however I am not able to find the post button to execute the operation (budget increase) . Can someone help me with below issue?

entry.title: ECC to Target CFIN S4 : Error- Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 001 not filled
entry.content:
Dear Members,

I am trying to validate document replication from Source ECC to Target CFIN.

With respect to this validation, I have posted SD and MM documents in ECC replicate to CFIN S4.
Document creation flow as followed:
creation of sales order - VA01 > 
creation of delivery & post goods issue -VL01N >
billing invoice creation -VF01 OR VF04 > 
creation of purchase requisition - ME51N > 
creation of purchase order-ME21N > creation of goods receipt - MIGO > creation of supplier invoice - MIRO

The RV document under VF01 need to replicate to S4 with success posting's in target BKPF table , However I am facing Error: (Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 001 not filled).

As per S4 Document splitting settings PRCTR is mandatory and in ECC RV type document VF01 we are not maintained profit center. How to work around with successful posting in S4 CFIN ?
What are the steps and pre requisites I need to follow or which I am missing please suggest.

For example : A material transfer document from one plant to another plant. MIGO_GR Doc type WE posted in ECC was not successful in CFIN S4 displaying same error.

Thanks,

entry.title: Massa de despesa com cartao de crédito no Concur
entry.content: Como gerar massa de despesa com cartao de crédito no Concur para cenários de testes?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA 2023 and Concur-Integration
entry.content:
Dear all,

we are moving from SAP ECC to S/4 HANA 2023 (brownfield conversion) and we are using Concur.

The installed Add-Ons are CTE_FND, CTE_FIN and CTE_HCM. SAP ERP-TO-CONCUR INTEGRATION Release 1.0 SP 21.

Now when preparing the S/4 HANA system for the migration, do we have to deinstall the Add-Ons or do they have an integrated deinstallation routine? I know that the Add-Ons are not required, but in the Maintenance Planner we need this information.

Best Regards,

Afzal
